dialogueChunks.intro: They're talking, {player_name}. After three generations, they're actually talking.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The bridge stands. The first people to cross were children from both settlements. {target_npc} was released and stood in the middle with a foot on each side, grinning. My friend crossed for the first time in years. {quest_focus} isn't solved yet, but people are talking instead of stockpiling. That's everything.
dialogueChunks.outro: You built more than a bridge. You built the first step back from {quest_stakes}. Take this: it was gathered from both sides of the valley.

playerResponses.text: Children crossing first. That's how peace should start.
Three generations of hate, and all it took was a bridge. Keep talking.
Talking is a start. Now solve the water problem before winter.

dialogueChunks.plotStep: The elder council had no choice. The {enemy_type} nest is cleared, the northern road is safe. The vote was unanimous: full resident status. {target_npc} stood in the council chamber and said 'This community is stronger because this person chose us.' {quest_focus} is behind me now. {quest_threat} lost to proof they couldn't deny.
dialogueChunks.outro: Six months of being told I don't belong: all of it worth it for the moment they said 'welcome home.' Take this: it's from my first earnings as a full resident.

playerResponses.text: Welcome home. You earned every inch of it.
Full resident status. Unanimous. They won't regret it.

dialogueChunks.intro: Look at this, {player_name}. Whole again, after all these years.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The heirloom is restored. When I presented it at the gathering, the room went silent. My father stared and said something nobody expected: 'We should never have broken it.' {target_npc} says the families have agreed to share a meal at the next feast. My partner and I stood side by side in public for the first time. {quest_focus} is beginning to mend.
dialogueChunks.outro: You walked through danger to retrieve {quest_origin}. This reward comes from both families: the first thing they've agreed on in a generation.

playerResponses.text: Two halves reunited. Two families at one table. That's the real treasure.
Standing together in public. That took more courage than clearing any ruin.
